last_episode_to_air.name: Footprints
last_episode_to_air.overview: The Slow Horses fight for their lives. Lamb shares some devastating truths with Catherine.

name: Slow Horses
overview: Follow a dysfunctional team of MI5 agents—and their obnoxious boss, the notorious Jackson Lamb—as they navigate the espionage world's smoke and mirrors to defend England from sinister forces.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Long-buried Cold War secrets emerge which threaten to bring carnage to the streets of London. When a liaison with Russian villains takes a fatal turn, our hapless heroes must overcome their individual failings and raise their spy game in a race to prevent a catastrophic incident.

seasons.name: Season 3
seasons.overview: A romantic liaison in Istanbul threatens to expose a buried MI5 secret in London. When Jackson Lamb and his team of misfits are dragged into the fight, they find themselves caught in a conspiracy that threatens the future not just of Slough House but of MI5 itself.

seasons.name: Season 4
seasons.overview: In season 4, a bombing detonates personal secrets, rocking Slough House's already unstable foundations.

tagline: It's spy vs. spy vs. spy.

episodes.name: Failure’s Contagious
episodes.overview: River Cartwright is ousted from MI5 and finds himself in a place worse than purgatory: Slough House, dumping ground for failed spies.

episodes.name: Work Drinks
episodes.overview: River and Sid join forces. A misfired gun has dire consequences.

episodes.name: Bad Tradecraft
episodes.overview: Slough House is the unlikely venue for a secret romance, but events take a dark turn when a dangerous encounter becomes deadly.

episodes.name: Visiting Hours
episodes.overview: Taverner sends the Dogs to hunt down Lamb and the Slow Horses. River holds the secret to saving the gang.

episodes.name: Fiasco
episodes.overview: The Slow Horses must disappear to avoid capture by MI5. Lamb and River head to The Park to outwit Taverner.

episodes.name: Follies
episodes.overview: Taverner and the Slow Horses attempt different approaches to locate the kidnappers and Hassan. Ho makes a shocking discovery about Sid.

episodes.name: Last Stop
episodes.overview: Jackson Lamb is on high alert after a former spy is found dead. Min and Louisa are tempted by an offer from outside Slough House.

episodes.name: From Upshott with Love
episodes.overview: Lamb liaises with a Russian defector who may hold a clue to sleeper agents. River is on the trail of a ruthless assassin.

episodes.name: Drinking Games
episodes.overview: River gets cozy in the Cotswolds while searching for a sleeper agent. Min discovers Russian drinking games are the most brutal of all.

episodes.name: Cicada
episodes.overview: Louisa makes her move on Pashkin. Catherine makes moves of a different kind when she plays high-stakes chess with a sinister stranger.

episodes.name: Boardroom Politics
episodes.overview: Lamb orders his Slow Horses to walk into traps. River believes something alarming is heading toward London.

episodes.name: Old Scores
episodes.overview: Lamb and Katinsky go head-to-head. Ho finds himself trapped on a train with a Russian assassin.

2.name: Season 2
2.overview: Long-buried Cold War secrets emerge which threaten to bring carnage to the streets of London. When a liaison with Russian villains takes a fatal turn, our hapless heroes must overcome their individual failings and raise their spy game in a race to prevent a catastrophic incident.

episodes.name: Strange Games
episodes.overview: A romantic relationship in Istanbul ends badly. Lamb hits the panic button when one of his Slow Horses fails to show up for work.

episodes.name: Hard Lessons
episodes.overview: River has to steal something out of the Park to save a life. Lamb realizes a stranger game is afoot.

episodes.name: Negotiating with Tigers
episodes.overview: Marcus and Shirley face Lamb's wrath. River discovers revenge is a dish best served cold.

episodes.name: Uninvited Guests
episodes.overview: Tearney makes a bold move. The Slow Horses assist the Tiger Team, unaware of their hidden agenda. Lamb and Ho take a road trip.

episodes.name: Cleaning Up
episodes.overview: Taverner and Tearney face off for control of MI5. River and Louisa find themselves caught in the crossfire.

episodes.name: Footprints
episodes.overview: The Slow Horses fight for their lives. Lamb shares some devastating truths with Catherine.

3.name: Season 3
3.overview: A romantic liaison in Istanbul threatens to expose a buried MI5 secret in London. When Jackson Lamb and his team of misfits are dragged into the fight, they find themselves caught in a conspiracy that threatens the future not just of Slough House but of MI5 itself.

4.name: Season 4
4.overview: In season 4, a bombing detonates personal secrets, rocking Slough House's already unstable foundations.
